# Description
Please include a summary of the structural changes or the autonomous tool the Swarm synthesized. Include relevant context.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Swarm Auto-Synthesis (Autonomous Meta-Programming Tool generated by AI)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing state graphs to fail)

## How Has This Been Tested?
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes.
- [ ] Verified LangGraph nodes successfully pass state internally
- [ ] Verified the `interrupt_before` node successfully halts execution
- [ ] Passed Pytest/Flake8 local checks

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the core Swarm architecture guidelines
- [ ] I have updated the `README.md` if making user-facing changes
- [ ] I have commented complex node traversal logic
